title: FermionModeRecord
description: A single computed fermionic eigenmode from a Dirac-type spectral solve in Phase IV.

backgroundId.description: Background record ID from which this mode was computed

bundleId.description: DiracOperatorBundle ID used for the spectral solve

eigenvalue.description: Eigenvalue of the Dirac operator for this mode

gaugeLeakScore.description: Gauge leak score: fraction of mode energy in gauge subspace

modeIndex.description: Index within the fermionic spectrum (0-based, sorted by |eigenvalue| ascending)

conjugatePairModeId.description: Mode ID of the conjugate partner mode, if identified

conjugatePairOverlap.description: Inner-product overlap with conjugate partner mode

isMajoranaCandidate.description: Whether this mode satisfies the Majorana self-conjugacy condition

modeVector.description: Mode vector coefficients (may be empty if stored externally)

modeVectorArtifactRef.description: Artifact path reference for the stored mode vector on disk

observedSignatureRef.description: Reference to the computed observed fermion signature

blockEnergyFractions.description: Energy fraction per state-space block. Values are non-negative and sum to 1.0.

tensorEnergyFractions.description: Energy fraction per tensor signature label. Values are non-negative and sum to 1.0.

leftFraction.description: Fraction of mode energy in the left-chiral sector

rightFraction.description: Fraction of mode energy in the right-chiral sector

chiralBalance.description: Chiral balance (R - L) / (R + L); -1 = purely left, +1 = purely right

dominantChirality.description: Dominant chirality sector: left, right, or mixed

imbalanceFlagTriggered.description: Whether the chiral imbalance exceeded the configured threshold

refinementPersistenceScore.description: Stability score across mesh refinement levels [0, 1]

chiralProfileStability.description: Stability of chirality profile across contexts [0, 1]

conjugationConsistency.description: Consistency of conjugate-pair assignment across contexts [0, 1]
